title: Choloma, CR — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Choloma is a city in CR with a population of 250,000. An industrial suburb of San Pedro Sula, known for its maquiladora factories and manufacturing industry.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
